# allocator

**Instance Property**

The allocator object that created the zone.

## Declaration

```swift
var allocator: any MDLMeshBufferAllocator { get }
```

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator/newZone(_:)] method of a concrete class implementing the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator] protocol to create a zone.

## Inspecting a Zone

- **capacity**: The data capacity of the zone, in bytes.
